titleStmt.title: SII 9.626: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 626. (A.R. No. 260 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN A FIELD NEAR THE TANK-BUND AT HAGARANURU, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Kārtika, śu. 2, Budhavāra. In Plavaṅga the details cited corresponded to A.D. 1547 October 15, Saturday, not Wednesday, as stated. It refers itself to the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya and records that Bemma-Nāyaka, son of Muḍugandala-Tammarasa-Nāyaka, made a grant of the village Amaragere in Raṅgapura-sthala, situated in Koṭūra-sīme, which had been granted by the king to Kṛishṇapa-Nāyaka, son of Bayapa-Nāyaka, to Varuṇakānta-Voḍeya, son of Kapilamuni-Heggapa-Śivāchārya-Voḍeya of Mayilāra. The gift was made for the merit of Kṛishṇapa-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayādyuda
yaśālivāhanaśakavaruśa
1469 neya plavaṁgasaṁ
vacharada kārttika śuddha 2 bu
śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīsa
dāśivarāyamahārā
yaru bayapanāyakara
maga kruṣṇapanayakarige pālista
koṭūra sīme voḷagaṇa raṁga
purastaḷadoḷagaṇa Amara
gereyanu kruṣṇappanāyaka
rige pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu
muḍugaṁdala taṁmara
sanāyakara maga beṁma
nāyakaru mayilārada
kapilamuni hegga paśivā
cāryyavaḍeyara makaḷu
varuṇakāṁtavaḍeyarige
koṭa bhūdānada śāsana
svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ parada
tāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niḥ
phalaṁ bhavēt . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ta vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] śaṣṭirvvaruśa
sahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.626 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
